title: Bubble sort with length-preservation postcondition
description: bubble_sort preserves list length. Print sorted [5,3,8,1,9] and [2,1].
prompt: Write a Kodo module with a bubble_sort(lst: List<Int>) -> List<Int> function that ensures result.length == lst.length. Print the sorted result of [5,3,8,1,9] and [2,1] (print each element on a new line).
